name: autoresearch
description: Autonomous iterative optimization loops. Generates standalone skills that repeatedly hypothesize improvements, modify code, evaluate results against binary pass/fail metrics, and commit or revert — running without human intervention until goals are met.

commands.name: autoresearch
commands.description: Start an autonomous optimization loop for a given goal

commands.name: autoresearch-status
commands.description: Check progress of a running or completed autoresearch loop

commands.name: autoresearch-init
commands.description: Initialize an autoresearch skill for a domain without starting the loop

commands.name: autoresearch-resume
commands.description: Resume an interrupted autoresearch loop from its last checkpoint
